ticketCategories.name: General Support
ticketCategories.description: General questions about the server, gameplay help, or how things work.

forms.question: Your Question
forms.placeholder: What do you need help with?

ticketCategories.name: Bug Reports
ticketCategories.description: Report server bugs, crashes, or broken mechanics. Please provide as much detail as possible!

forms.question: Bug Description
forms.placeholder: What happened? Be as detailed as possible.

forms.question: Steps to Reproduce
forms.placeholder: How can we make this bug happen again?

forms.question: Mods Involved
forms.placeholder: Which mod(s) are related to this bug?

forms.question: Error Messages or Crash Logs (max 4000 chars)
forms.placeholder: If log is long, post in Discord or upload to Pastebin/Gist and paste the link.

ticketCategories.name: Player Reports
ticketCategories.description: Report rule violations, griefing, or other player behavior issues. All reports are confidential.

forms.question: What happened?
forms.placeholder: Describe the incident (griefing, harassment, rule breaking, etc.)

ticketCategories.name: Event or Suggestion
ticketCategories.description: Suggest new features, mods, events, or improvements for BebraLand!

forms.question: Your Idea
forms.placeholder: What's your suggestion? (new mod, event, building competition, rule change, etc.)

forms.question: Why would this be good for BebraLand?
forms.placeholder: How would this improve the server or community experience?
